title: artifact-bakeoff-verdict
description: Mechanical verdict of an empirical bake-off. A handoff artifact (NOT a stage gate): records which candidate direction won by real numbers, or refuses to crown one when the gap sits inside the measured noise band. Written by bakeoff_rank.py.

verdict.description: winner = beats runner-up beyond the noise band; tie_within_noise = hand to human; insufficient_trials = too few trials for the noise level

winner.description: winning candidate, or null when not a clear winner

candidates.description: every candidate (losers included — no silent cut)

rep.description: representative score (median or worse-of by noise)

observed_spread_floor.description: max spread across candidates — the honesty floor on band

over_budget.description: candidates that exceeded the time/token budget
